# Run Report: only-lvmt-s08 — LVMT 1M Stat Benchmark (16 Shards)

**Experiment ID:** only-lvmt-s08  
**Algorithm:** LVMT  
**Key count:** 1,000,000 (1m)  
**Variant:** stat (read-only), 16 shards  
**Date:** 2026-04-15  
**Status:** COMPLETE

---

## Environment

| Parameter       | Value                           |
|-----------------|---------------------------------|
| Machine         | fcs-0033                        |
| OS              | Linux (cgroup v2)               |
| Rust toolchain  | 1.67.0                          |
| Memory limit    | 8 GB (cgroup `/sys/fs/cgroup/lvmt`) |
| `drop_caches`   | 3 (before benchmark start)      |
| `CXXFLAGS`      | `-Wno-error -include cstdint`   |

## Command

```bash
cargo run --release -- --stat --warmup-from ./warmup/v4 -k 1m -a lvmt --shards 16
```

## Results Summary

| Metric              | Value         |
|---------------------|---------------|
| Epochs completed    | 198           |
| Total time          | 189.914 s     |
| Throughput          | 108,122 ops/s |
| Latency (avg)       | 9.249 µs/op   |
| Empty reads         | 0             |
| Read amplification  | 1.665         |
| Write amplification | 1.665         |
| Avg levels          | 1.673         |
| Access writes       | [4110, 64825, 0, 2] |
| Data writes         | 200,000       |

## Key Observations

1. **36% slower than plain, 23% slower than 64-shard.** Fewer shards = larger per-shard
   trees = deeper traversals = more amplification.
2. **Read/Write amp = 1.665.** Each operation touches ~1.67 nodes — significantly more
   than 64 shards (1.144) because each of the 16 shards holds 4× more keys.
3. **Access writes: 4110 + 64825.** 4× more access entries than 64-shard, proportional
   to the shard size ratio (16 shards each holding 62.5k keys vs 64 shards with 15.6k).
4. **189.9s vs 181.6s (time benchmark).** Consistent with other variants — stat overhead
   is ~4%.

## Comparison: Stat Benchmarks (1M keys)

| Metric              | Plain (s06)  | 64 Shards (s07) | 16 Shards (s08) |
|---------------------|--------------|-----------------|-----------------|
| Throughput          | 167,974 ops/s| 140,196 ops/s   | 108,122 ops/s   |
| Latency             | 5.953 µs     | 7.133 µs        | 9.249 µs        |
| Read/Write amp      | 0.975        | 1.144           | 1.665           |
| Access writes       | [0,0,0,2]    | [1003,15839,0,2]| [4110,64825,0,2]|
| Time                | 118.5 s      | 141.6 s         | 189.9 s         |
